response.overview: Pharrell Williams is one of the most dynamic talents in music. His unwavering work ethic as a writer and producer has contributed to the success of The Neptunes, Britney Spears, Nelly, Kelis, Justin Timberlake and many others. What's the secret to his success In this exclusive documentary we explore his talent as a producer, composer, song writer, fashion designer, businessman and philanthropist.
response.title: Pharrell Williams: A New Beginning
